product_overview: Pos-Sahl is an Arabic-first web app for small-to-medium retailers that provides a fast POS interface, inventory management, and sales invoice history. It focuses on quick checkout, product CRUD, and an accessible dashboard for daily operations.
core_goals: Allow a cashier to search/select products and complete a retail sale in under 5 seconds
Enable store managers to add, edit and organize products and categories quickly
Provide owners with an immediate sales invoice history and printable receipts
Make onboarding and authentication simple so teams can start using the app immediately
Surface essential inventory and sales information on the dashboard for daily decision-making

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Sign in or register to access the application and reach the dashboard and protected areas.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email and password -> Submit login form -> See /dashboard
Navigate to /register -> Fill registration details -> Submit registration form -> See /dashboard
Navigate to /register -> Submit registration form with missing required field -> See inline validation error

features.name: Inventory Management
features.description: Create, update and view products and categories so managers can maintain accurate stock data.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/inventory -> Initiate add product -> Fill product details -> Submit product form -> See new product listed on /dashboard/inventory
Navigate to /dashboard/inventory -> Open existing product from list -> Update product fields -> Save changes -> See updated product in list
Navigate to /dashboard/inventory -> Initiate add product -> Fill product details with missing required field -> Submit product form -> See inline validation error

features.name: POS Sale
features.description: Process retail transactions by selecting products, adjusting quantities, accepting payments and generating a sales record.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/pos -> Select products for the sale -> Change quantity for a selected product -> Choose payment methods and enter amounts -> Complete payment -> See new invoice in /dashboard/sales
Navigate to /dashboard/pos -> Select products -> Attempt to set an invalid quantity (e.g., negative number) -> See validation error preventing submission

features.name: Sales (Invoices & History)
features.description: Browse and review past sales invoices, apply filters, and inspect invoice details for reconciliation or reporting.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/sales -> See list of invoices for the default period -> Apply date or search filters -> See filtered invoice list
Navigate to /dashboard/sales -> Open an invoice from the list (inline or drawer) -> See full invoice details and line items

features.name: Inventory Management
features.description: CRUD operations for products and categories

features.name: POS Sale
features.description: Processing retail sales via POS interface
